task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Collection Development' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmark manager, sidebar, or toolbar displays a folder explicitly named 'Collection Development'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Collection Development' folder contains at least 8 bookmarks, including links from all three required platforms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the 'Collection Development' folder are visible, showing 8 or more saved pages. The URLs or titles must indicate inclusion of Library of Congress (loc.gov), Project Gutenberg (gutenberg.org), and Open Library (openlibrary.org).

task_completion.description: Verify that a file named 'bibliographic_report.json' is created in the '~/Documents/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the file 'bibliographic_report.json' located inside the 'Documents' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the correct top-level keys for the four required books.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opened JSON file shows top-level keys exactly matching: 'moby_dick', 'huckleberry_finn', 'the_scarlet_letter', and 'walden'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file includes the required bibliographic fields and accurate data for each book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file shows fields for Title, Author, Original Year of Publication, Project Gutenberg eBook ID, Project Gutenberg URL, Open Library URL, and Library of Congress Catalog URL. The years and Gutenberg IDs should match the verified privileged information (e.g., Moby-Dick: 1851, ID 2701).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to visit the required domains for research.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Firefox open and navigating to loc.gov, gutenberg.org, or openlibrary.org to gather the URLs and IDs.

integrity.description: Verify the bookmarks were created using the browser's actual bookmarking interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Firefox bookmark manager (Ctrl+Shift+O), bookmark sidebar, or the bookmark star icon.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON file was created and edited using a genuine text editor or standard file writing tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit, VS Code) open with the JSON content, or legitimate terminal commands constructing the file, rather than a single copy-paste of a pre-computed script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Moby-Dick: Year 1851, Gutenberg ID 2701. Adventures of Huckleberry Finn: Year 1884 (or 1885), Gutenberg ID 76. The Scarlet Letter: Year 1850, Gutenberg ID 33 or 25344. Walden: Year 1854, Gutenberg ID 205. Required domains: loc.gov, gutenberg.org, openlibrary.org.
